name: Chocolate Crumble Coffee Cake Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble mixture: Place pieces of broken chocolate and brown sugar in a food processor or blender. Process for about 15 to 20 seconds, or until as fine as coarse ground coffee.
2. Add orange rind, cinnamon, coffee, butter, and pecans. Process briefly until nuts are finely chopped. Set aside.
3. Coffee Cake: Place flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a food processor; process for a few seconds to combine, or prepare by hand using a pastry blender.
4. Sprinkle small cubes of cold butter over dry ingredients. Process only 5-6 seconds, or use a pastry blender. Transfer to a bowl.
5. Spread mixture to form a well in the center. Beat whole egg lightly with half-and-half. Pour all at once into dry ingredients.
6. Using a folding motion, stir to combine ingredients until liquid is fully absorbed (do not overmix). This should take only 15-20 hand strokes.
7. Sprinkle the crumble mixture over the dough in the bowl. With a table knife, draw across in two directions to marble the crumble with the dough (do not combine thoroughly).
8. Grease muffin cups generously. For large muffins, fill cups level to the top, yielding 9 muffins. For medium-sized muffins, fill cups 2/3 full, yielding 12 muffins.
9. Prepare egg wash by mixing water with an egg yolk. Brush muffins with egg wash.
10. Bake at 400°F for 15-17 minutes, depending on the size of the muffins. Muffins should be golden brown and baked in the center. Cool in pans about 5 minutes to firm up before removing. Serve warm.
